description: This file defines API routes for user management in a web application, including endpoints for retrieving current user info, listing users, creating a new user, and updating existing users. It uses FastAPI, interacts with user and audit repositories, and handles role-based access control.

methods.name: UserResponse me(user: dict = Depends(get_current_user))
methods.description: Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated user.

methods.name: list[UserResponse] list_users( limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0, users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), _: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
UserResponse create_user( payload: UserCreateRequest, users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: Creates a new user, restricted to administrators, and records an audit log.

methods.name: UserResponse update_user( user_id: str, payload: UserUpdateRequest, users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: Updates an existing user's information, restricted to administrators, and records an audit log.

ctags.name: create_user
ctags.signature: ( payload: UserCreateRequest, users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )

ctags.name: list_users
ctags.signature: ( limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0, users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), _: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )

ctags.name: update_user
ctags.signature: ( user_id: str, payload: UserUpdateRequest, users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
